gantt
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    section Timeline
        Build      :b1, 2024-03-01, 10d
        Launch     :milestone, m1, after b1, 0d
        Freeze     :vert, v1, 2024-03-05, 0d
        Post work  :p1, after m1, 4d
---

    Build      #############################-----------  03-01 -> 03-11
    Launch     -----------:-----------------*----------  03-11
    Post work  -----------:-----------------###########  03-11 -> 03-15
    Freeze                :  03-05
